summary: Sen. Johnson writes to Califf and Cohen highlighting higher rates of adverse events connected to specific manufacture lots of COVID-19 vaccine and reiterating December requests for EB data mining.
body: Sen. Johnson sends a letter to FDA Commissioner Dr. Robert Califf and CDC Director Dr. Mandy Cohen highlighting the issue of higher rates of adverse events connected to specific manufacture lots of COVID-19 vaccine and reiterating requests from December, including the request for all EB data mining analysis on COVID-19 vaccines.[^fn-285]
